response.justification: Bogdan brings 15+ years of progressive full-stack experience with strong alignment to the primary stack — TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB — demonstrated across multiple senior and staff-level roles. His recent work at re:cinq on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling directly maps to the AI agent development requirement. His deep TDD culture and testing advocacy are a strong fit for a quality-focused team. The main gaps are the absence of explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience, limited Kotlin/Java backend work, and an active career gap since October 2025, which warrant clarification but do not disqualify him.
strengths: Strong TypeScript/Node.js/React stack match with recent production experience at Optilyz and re:cinq, including AWS and MongoDB
Direct AI agent development experience building MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks at re:cinq
Demonstrated TDD and software craftsmanship culture across multiple roles, including creating testing libraries and running industry workshops
concerns: Nest.js is not mentioned anywhere in the resume despite being the primary backend framework in the job description
Kotlin/Java backend experience is minimal — Java appears only in an embedded/robotics context, not in service development
Active career gap since October 2025 with no explanation provided beyond 'career gap'

key_factors.factor: No Nest.js or Kotlin/Java backend experience
